value.found_quote: Claude Code can connect to hundreds of external tools and data sources through the [Model Context Protocol (MCP)](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/introduction), an open source standard for AI-tool integrations. MCP servers give Claude Code access to your tools, databases, and APIs.
value.rationale: The page describes Claude Code connecting to external tools via MCP servers/connectors, and explicitly references integrations with GitHub (e.g., "create a PR on GitHub", "claude mcp get github"), Slack ("posted in Slack"), and a JIRA/issue-tracker workflow. It mentions browsing "reviewed connectors in the Anthropic Directory." While Linear is not explicitly named, the page substantiates the core claim that Anthropic offers connecting external tools like GitHub and Slack via connectors. The offering is presented as currently available.
